title: Players Structures
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c98fc6c0db663721d25aa052bb3256052ca907c.png)

[Discord](https://discord.gg/VbTqEf8QXr)

_You're alone in this world, but there were other players before you, so where are their buildings?_

_This mod will fix it!!_

Now you can find 20 NEW BUILDINGS in the world and explore them!
But that's not all, you can find ancient scrolls as well as 3 new music disks!

**Good luck!**
